title: QDC CORE 4.5
description: 5th Version of the QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft mod. Focusing on QOL Usability and other Mods Compatibility.
body:
5th Version of the QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft mod. Focusing on QOL Usability and other Mods Compatibility.

This is both a Mod and a Core mod for future QDC Mods.

 Main Mod Functionalities

- Disassemble items for Virtual Particles Currency.
- Discover Items when disassembling an item for the first time.
- Assemble Items from particles, but it also required that the Item is Discovered or all items in one of the recipes, are discovered.

# Official Vid
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IYEktWWDWpA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**- Qdc Main Item**

![QDC Main Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63a7b4bf85279d4e0ec74455368002c8abc680b1.png)

This item is automatically given to the player if not found in the inventory on world load.

This item is used to access all the Screens and Menus in this mod.


**- Assember & Disassembler Screen**

![Disassembler & Assembler GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bb363024ac82d4142645d2d3abe57c77d77cb07.png)

Click on an item in the window on the left to open the Assembly Window.

![Item Assembler Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7df84e10120f538f8be49995bbc621993c3833af.png)

Click on an item in the Inventory window at the bottom to open the Disassembly Window.

![Item Disassembler Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422f98439e1af3978a18dcce03dd0d1d11d04426.png)

**- Main Menu Screen**

![Main Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4583d5730813f939f5e0ead7aeb63a6e82817552_0.webp)

**- Particle Configuration Screen**

![Particle Configuration Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2256c1c1372e9896dc6360f8add6c77aad019d33.png)

This allows the user to set the particle values for the ingredient items. Items that can be created from a recipe will have their particles auto calculated from ingredients in the recipes.

This section required a creative world, simply make a new creative world to setup the aprticles, settings will eb shared on all worlds in the same Minecraft Instance.

**- Quantum Sacrifice Screen**

Quantum sacrifice is a Mob Drop Loot System that drops items after a certain amount of damage is dealt to mobs. Once an item reches the amount of damage needed, it will drop when the next mob is killed. One of the items dropped will eb a random Undiscovered Item.

![Quantum Sacrifice Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a905ef4c64553737e41518607f83c520ca322ca1.png)
